pr.title: [docs] Add stats cache freeze troubleshooting entry for lastComputedDate stagnation (#61686)
pr.body:
## Summary

Adds a troubleshooting entry for ~/.claude/stats-cache.json \lastComputedDate\ not advancing — a silent failure in the stats recompute path that causes new model IDs to be missing from \modelUsage\ and the stats dashboard to show increasingly stale data.

References #61686

## Problem

The incremental recompute silently fails when encountering session files with unknown model IDs, multi-day sessions (first-message date < \lastComputedDate\ but last-message > it), or corrupt data. Once \lastComputedDate\ stops advancing, the freeze is self-perpetuating — no new sessions are ever scanned.

## Workaround documented

\\\ ash
rm ~/.claude/stats-cache.json
# Restart Claude Code to force a full rebuild
\\\

## Related issues

- #46139 (same freeze, March 2026)
- #50404 (cache drops days on reinstall)
- #48213 (streak broken despite valid session files)
pr.author: giruuuuj
